query:
SELECT sp.id, sp.name, sp.isLive, COUNT(t.id) as transaction_count 
FROM saved_portfolios sp 
LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.portfolioId = sp.id 
WHERE sp.name LIKE '%Marc Test%' OR sp.name = 'Regula' OR sp.name LIKE '%Portfolio Test%'
GROUP BY sp.id, sp.name, sp.isLive
ORDER BY sp.name
